items.title: Salty Waters, Silent Struggles
items.body: Sexual & reproductive health of women in the salinity-stressed coastal belt of Bangladesh — a multi-year study at the intersection of climate vulnerability and gendered care.

items.title: The Talking Bodies
items.body: Body performativity in the July Movement 2024, Dhaka — how protest, presence, and the body became language during a defining political moment.

items.title: USD 80,000 Research Grant
items.body: Awarded a competitive Higher Education Acceleration & Transformation grant — placing among the top 10.2% of proposals nationally.
